pitch: Modern, automation-leveraged accounting and tax practice for South African SMEs, freelancers, and startups (Cape Town).
pitch_reframe_note: Original pitch supplied was 'Embedded working-capital and cashflow tools for Southeast Asian wholesalers.' Founder-check found no SEA presence; LedgerLoop's public footprint and Dylan Martens's own LinkedIn describe a Cape Town accounting/tax practice. VC reframed on 2026-04-28 to evaluate the actual practice.
